title: My Profile
subtitle: Take care of your account, your data, and your next steps.

hero.greeting: Your personal space at Gold Mustache
hero.description: Track your account, keep your details up to date, and handle everything from one place.
hero.noPhone: Add a phone number to speed up your next appointments.
hero.pendingNone: Your account is ready for your next appointments.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Shortcuts for the tasks you use most often.
quickActions.exportDescription: Download a file with your data

personal.title: Personal details
personal.description: Basic information and address for reference.

security.title: Account health
security.description: Password, verification, and account safety signals.

privacy.title: Privacy and data rights
privacy.description: Access your data and understand how your account is handled.

personalInfo.title: Personal information
personalInfo.description: Your main details for service and contact.

address.title: Address
address.description: Your address for reference and account organization.

save.error: Error updating profile. Please try again.

emailVerification.title: Email verification
emailVerification.description: Confirm your email to strengthen account security.
emailVerification.unverifiedWarning: Verifying your email increases your account security and enables password recovery.
emailVerification.success: Verification email sent! Check your inbox.
emailVerification.error: Error sending verification email. Please try again.
emailVerification.hint: An email will be sent with a link to confirm your address. Also check your spam folder.

password.title: Change password
password.success: Your password has been changed successfully!
password.error: Error changing password. Please try again.

validation.minLength: Password must have at least 6 characters

dataRights.title: LGPD export
dataRights.description: Download a JSON file with the data associated with your account.

includes.accountDescription: Registration details, account metadata, and your core profile information.
includes.appointmentsDescription: Service history, appointment data, and consents linked to your access.

dataRights.hint: The file is generated at request time and may include account history, appointments, and recorded consents.
dataRights.exportBody: Whenever you need it, export a full snapshot of your account for review, portability, or personal records.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.description: Permanently delete your account and the personal data in your area
deleteAccount.success: Your account has been successfully deleted.
deleteAccount.error: Error deleting account. Please try again.

warning.title: This action is irreversible!
warning.item1: All your personal data will be deleted
warning.item2: Appointment history may be retained without personal identification for operational purposes
warning.item3: You will lose access to your account and preferences

dialog.title: Are you sure?
dialog.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete your account and remove the personal data linked to your access.
